name: Metabase
description: Metabase is commonly used to support data / analytics workflows, reviews, and handoffs.
whyUseIt: Use Metabase when the team needs more structure, visibility, or speed in data / analytics work.
founderWorkflow: Use Metabase to keep data / analytics work visible enough for fast reviews and cleaner delegation.
beginnerMistakes: Adding Metabase before the process around it is defined.
Using the tool as a reporting surface instead of a decision surface.
